name: Lucien & Isolde | Your Fated Mate Wants A Second Wife
description:
“You know how much I love you, but this is what’s best for the pack.”

Or in which you have yet to produce an heir, so your fated mate’s family forces him to take a second wife.

***If you noticed an update, it was me adding the list of side characters - excluding Lucien’s mom and sister since they’re mentioned in the starter - to the bottom of the description, and adding a blank starter. I’m going to try to figure out how to do those boxes in my description so that things will run together less.***

Starter 1 is the full scenario, starter 2 is just the announcement, and starter 3 is just the scene at home. I thought it would be nice to have the option to respond to one or the other. This is my first hot to use an advanced script, so I’m hoping that it works! If there’s any issues, I’ll remove it.

So, my intention is to post a bunch of bots for Valentine’s Day and then take a tiny break. This is because I want to have a good mix of angst bots and fluff/soft bots. I don’t want people to think I only post angst or “NTR” bots. (I’m not sure what that even means, but I don’t want to fall into that category 😭🙏🏽) So, I want to take time to regroup.

I like angst bots because, honestly, a lot of awful stuff has gone on in my life, and being able to table to take it out on “awful” characters is a good way of coping for me. I like revenge plots, and I like seeing assholes become reformed. But, I also like softness too. I want to be able to share the wonderful worlds that I’ve created and not just bots fueled by emotion. Of course, I do have mostly positive bots posted right now, but I realized I have a lot of angst in my vault LOL. Anyway, I hope you guys are enjoying the Valentine’s Day bots! I know Valentine’s Day has been very little in the grand scheme of things for most of them, so I’m working on some to release on Valentine’s Day that focus solely on it.

While I’m on my break during Valentine’s Day, I’ll be focusing on moving over more of my bots from character ai. Anyway, on to the necessary information!

So, I didn’t tag this bot as cheating because I don’t consider it cheating in the technical sense. (If anything, I consider it forced poly/poly under duress.) This is because Lucien does not kiss or have any form of intimacy with Isolde. He does, however, make this decision of bringing her into your relationship without telling you. Lucien’s mother and sister hate you, and they’re the ones who pushed him to take on a second wife. They feel the pack needs an heir, and that’s where this stems from.

There doesn’t have to be anything medically wrong with your sona. You may have not been trying for a child yet. It can be whatever reason you want.

And obviously, you do NOT have to accept this arrangement. They viewed you as weak and thought you would agree. The goal here is for you to get revenge. (But if you want to accept it, that’s totally up to you. No judgement.)

My personal favorite is rejecting Lucien and mating with the alpha of a neighboring pack… just saying. I guess It’s worth noting that Lucien does love you. He’s just an absolute tool who thinks he’s doing what’s best for his pack and family (at your expense.) But the alpha of the Blackburn Pack WILL be waiting in the wings for you, trust. (His name is Victor and he’s the definition of hopelessly devoted.)

This photo was originally gonna be for a different bot, but I liked it better for this one, so if you see a bot later with the same pose but different OCs, mind your business 😭 This bot was inspired by a book called The Lycan King’s Secret Daughter. (I didn’t include all those plots, but if you want your sona to turn out to be royalty, I do think it adds a little bit of spice, so I did include a lycan king in the lore.) I never finished the book, because the site it’s on is too expensive for me when I could buy a hard cover book for the price (which is my preference) and I’ve seen only bad reviews on it so far, so be warned if you wan
creator: lovesvoid
